title: Dense Malt Spanish Grapefruit Paella
description: Post-workout Spanish dish featuring grapefruit juice, mortar-pestle-pounded rice and malty flavors. This recipe can be adapted to a raw-friendly diet by excluding the cooking step.

ingredients.name: Short-Grain Rice
ingredients.notes: Mortar-pestle-pound rice for 1-2 minutes before cooking.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with garlic.
Add beer and grapefruit juice, stirring to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
While rice is cooking, pound paprika, salt, and black pepper in a mortar and pestle until well combined.
Stir pounded spices into rice mixture.
Remove from heat and let sit for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped scallions and lemon zest.
